PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-21-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Francisco Silva, via Zoom, for Sandra Sutherland, Petitioner.

The court confirms that it believes that counsel's submissions rebut the presumption of title and that the community property are assets of the estate.

The Petition for Spousal Property is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Obitinalla. Not reported.
